mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SMS_BOX WHERE 1=1 AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND ${search_type} like '%' || #{search_text} || '%'
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, BOX_IDX, TITLE, CONTENTS, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE FROM CMS_SMS_BOX WHERE 1=1 AND box_idx = #{box_idx} AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_SMS_BOX SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, MODIFY_ID = #{add_id}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOX_IDX = #{box_idx} AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
UPDATE CMS_SMS_BOX SET DELETE_YN = 'Y', MODIFY_ID = #{add_id}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOX_IDX = #{box_idx} AND HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id}
